message:
Here are some resources that Living Savior Lutheran Church has found to be informative. These three documents contain useful information and links to additional resources.

  1. LCMS SE District letter regarding Corona Virus
  2. Middle Seat Travel Advice Letter (WSJ)
  3. Virginia Department of Health letter with helpful advice and important links.
Letter on e-giving during Coronavirus outbreak

BOSL Announces Virtual Voters’ Assembly on June 7th
The Board of Servant Leaders will host a virtual teleconference Voters’ Assembly on Sunday
column3: June 7th at 10am.   An agenda will be sent out with a Zoom invitation two weeks prior to the meeting.  If you are not currently receiving Living Savior Secretary emails and wish to attend
column4: please send an email to Steve Galing
